title: Bridge Essay: Consumer-Grade Neurofeedback With Mindfulness Meditation: Meta-Analysis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Consumer-Grade, Neurofeedback, With, Mindfulness, Meditation:.

**Consumer-Grade Neurofeedback With Mindfulness Meditation: Meta-Analysis.** — J Med Internet Res. PMID: 40246295. DOI: 10.2196/68204. There is burgeoning interest in the application of neuroscientific technology to facilitate meditation and lead to beneficial psychological outcomes. One popular approach is using consumer-grade neurofeedback devices to deliver feedback on brain targets during meditation (mindfulness-based neurofeedback). It is hypothesized that optimizing brain targets like alpha and theta band activity may allow meditators to experience deeper mindfulness and thus beneficial outcomes. This study aimed to syste
